keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Brazil 0, Morocco 1. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Brahim Díaz with a through ball following a fast break.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Brazil 1, Morocco 1. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.
Casemiro (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Roger Ibañez (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Brazil 1, Morocco 1.
Substitution, Brazil. Danilo replaces Roger Ibañez.
Substitution, Brazil. Fabinho replaces Casemiro.
Second Half begins Brazil 1, Morocco 1.
Substitution, Brazil. Matheus Cunha replaces Lucas Paquetá.
Substitution, Brazil. Luiz Henrique replaces Igor Thiago.
Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Azzedine Ounahi.
Substitution, Morocco. Chemsdine Talbi replaces Brahim Díaz.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Yassine Bounou (Morocco).
Substitution, Morocco. Anass Salah-Eddine replaces Noussair Mazraoui.
Substitution, Morocco. Ayoube Amaimouni-Echghouyab replaces Bilal El Khannouss.
Substitution, Brazil. Danilo Santos replaces Bruno Guimarães.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay in match because of an injury Yassine Bounou (Morocco).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Ismael Saibari.
